data.title: Chicago Atlantic Secures BBB+ Rating And $50M Loan To Enhance Liquidity In Cannabis Lending
data.description: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance has secured a $50 million loan and a BBB+ investment grade rating from Egan-Jones.

data.title: The Uptrend In Netflix Will Continue: Another 15% Upside Ahead
data.description: Netflix's (NASDAQ: NFLX) uptrend will continue because the company is still growing and outpacing forecasts.

data.title: Microsoft Reports Russia, Iran, China Stepping Up Efforts To Influence 2024 Election: Voters, Candidates 'Must Remain Vigilant,' Fact-Checking Remains 'Essential'
data.description: A Microsoft threat assessment report says Russia, Iran and China are ramping up efforts to influence the 2024 election.

data.title: 5 Things To Know In Investing This Week: The Central Bankers Are Delusional Issue
data.description: Central banks shatter irony meters as a Fed Governor insists they have unlimited dollars, but it’s Bitcoin that has no value. Not to be outdone, the European Central Bank lowers interest rates and at the same time, warns of coming higher inflation. They’d be better off admitting they’re trapped than saying nonsensical things in public.

data.title: What's Going On With Spirit Airlines Stock Wednesday?
data.description: Spirit Airlines, Inc. (NYSE:SAVE) shares are moving higher Wednesday following the resurgence of merger talks with Frontier Group Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:ULCC).
